raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Criminals willing to kill, or be involved with the killing of a police officer, are among the most violent.",
    "The felony-murder rule in California allowed any criminal involved in a serious crime resulting in death to face murder charges.",
    "Senate Bill 1437 eliminated the felony-murder rule from California law.",
    "Senate Bill 775 allowed for the reduction of sentences from previous felony-murder convictions in California.",
    "Senate Bill 1129 aims to reinstate the felony-murder rule in California for those involved in the killing of a police officer."
  ]
}
```
